name: Transfer Walking Belt
description:
A 移位习走带 (yí wèi xí zǒu dài) in English is commonly referred to as a gait belt or a transfer belt. 

Definition: A gait belt is a safety device used in healthcare and caregiving to help patients with walking (gait training) or to assist them when transferring from one position to another (e.g., from a bed to a wheelchair).

Purpose: It is designed to be worn around a patient's waist, providing a secure, strong handhold for caregivers to hold onto, which helps prevent falls and protects both the patient and the caregiver from back injuries.
Alternative English Terms:
Transfer belt (focused on moving from seat to seat).
Walking belt (focused on mobility assistance).
